analysis:
Based on your screening criteria, here are the qualifying opportunities:

## Best Covered Calls
**AMZN** - 275 strike, **2026-06-18**, 55 DTE, 8.55/8.70, δ=0.36, 22.2% annualized
**GOOGL** - 360 strike, **2026-06-18**, 55 DTE, 10.95/11.45, δ=0.38, 21.8% annualized  
**AAPL** - 285 strike, **2026-06-18**, 55 DTE, 6.80/6.95, δ=0.37, 16.7% annualized

## IVP Environment
High volatility environment with most core holdings showing IVP 70%+ - excellent for selling premium via covered calls, but too expensive for buying LEAPS or CSPs on quality names.

**No qualifying CSPs, LEAPS, PMCCs, or Bull Call Spreads** - All quality names either have IVP too high (>50% for LEAPS purchases) or fail technical/positioning criteria. Current environment favors selling premium against existing profitable positions.
